description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a modern, angular design with a dark, matte finish and subtle black trim lines. The front of the cabinet displays a large, illuminated screen with vibrant green and purple graphics, including a wireframe spaceship and code-like text, suggesting a sci-fi or hacking-themed game. Below the screen, the control panel is integrated at an ergonomic angle, featuring a glowing green virtual keyboard and a circular targeting interface, with no visible physical buttons or joysticks. The lower front section houses two cylindrical footrests or supports, adding to the futuristic aesthetic. The side panels are plain, with no visible artwork or decals, and the back is similarly unadorned. The overall construction appears robust, likely made from composite materials with a hard, smooth surface.
description: A modern, angular arcade game cabinet with a dark matte finish, glowing green and purple digital displays, and a virtual control panel. The design is sleek and futuristic, with plain side panels and illuminated front graphics.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cabinet's angular profile and the slanted control panel with a glowing green display.
description_view_1: Rear view revealing a plain, unadorned back panel with subtle trim lines and no visible features.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the angular profile and slanted control panel, with the illuminated display partially visible.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the large digital screen with sci-fi graphics, a virtual keyboard control panel, and two cylindrical footrests below.
attribute_screen_type: LED display, flat, medium size, with a thin bezel and vibrant digital graphics.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player virtual control panel with a glowing green keyboard and circular targeting interface, no visible physical buttons or joysticks.
